Document:
# Vampire: Gargantua
[color=#c56929][italic]"When subtlety ends — you begin..."[/italic][/color]
Gargantua is the breakthrough and brawler class. You become a direct threat, but you pay for it in visibility. Your job is to choose the moment when stealth stops being profitable and end the scene with force.
## Role in the Round
[bold]Breakpoint[/bold]: break security formations, force entry, delete solo patrols. [bold]Evac disruption[/bold]: hit critical points (bridge/med/armory) with good timing.
## Toolkit (Total Blood Threshold | Cost)
[bold](150 | 30)[/bold] Blood Swell Temporarily reduces incoming damage and shortens stun durations. Limitation: you cannot use guns while it is active. After 400 total blood, it also adds extra melee damage.
[bold](250 | 30)[/bold] Blood Rush A short speed spike: chase, escape, or crash into a formation.
[bold](250 | 30)[/bold] Seismic Stomp Slam the ground: knocks down and throws nearby creatures; can break floor tiles. Great for creating chaos and resetting distance.
[bold](600 | 0)[/bold] Overwhelming Force (toggle) Automatically pries unpowered doors. While active, you can't be pushed or pulled. Cost is blood per door (~5).
[bold](800 | 20)[/bold] Demonic Grasp A ranged “hand” up to 15 tiles: immobilizes the target and can pull them to you in combat mode.
[bold](1000 | 30)[/bold] Charge A charge to break through and finish targets.
